sections.heading: Story Context
sections.body: Ansh finds a mysterious map marked with strange coordinates. The first clue to escape MathVilla lies in plotting the right path.

sections.heading: Mathematical Concept
sections.body: The coordinate plane is formed by two number lines—the x-axis and y-axis—intersecting at the origin (0, 0).

sections.heading: Try It Yourself
sections.body: Plot A (2, 3), B (-1, 4), C (-4, -2), and D (3, -3). What hidden shape appears?

quote: The more you know, the more doors you unlock. — Ganith
